info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_User Account Management API
info.description: The User Account Creation API facilitates the onboarding of new users by allowing the secure registration of their accounts within the system. This endpoint empowers developers to manage user sign-ups by capturing essential information such as username, email, and password. Typical consumers include application developers and system integrators who aim to enhance user engagement through streamlined account registration processes. This API is a crucial component for applications seeking to provide users with access to personalized features and services.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new account by providing the necessary account details. It processes the request and returns the newly created account information.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new account. It must include the required fields according to the specified schema.

200.description: Request completed successfully with the updated account data.

404.description: The specified account was not found in the system.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Response

accountId.description: Unique identifier for the created account.

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: Type of the account (e.g., checking, savings).

currency.description: Currency in which the account balance is maintained.

status.description: Current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive).

branchCode.description: Code representing the branch where the account was opened.

createdDate.description: Date when the account was created in ISO 8601 format.

message.description: Additional message or information regarding the account creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing the response returned upon successful account creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for Account Operations

timestamp.description: The time when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the request, indicating failure.

error.description: A short, human-readable summary of the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the reason for the error.
message.example: Customer profile not found for account creation.

path.description: The path requested in the API.

trace.description: A trace identifier for tracking the error.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on what to do next.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and submit the request again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the error response returned when an account operation fails with a 404 status code.

example.message: Customer profile not found for account creation.

details.message: No registered banking customer exists with the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and submit the request again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.title: ErrorDetails

service.description: Name of the service where the error occurred.

errorCode.description: A specific error code associated with the error.

message.description: A message providing more details about the error.

database.description: Name of the database involved in the error.

retryable.description: Indicates whether this error can be retried.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: Detailed information about the error that occurred during account operations.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

accountType.description: The type of the account being opened, such as savings or checking.

currency.description: The currency in which the account will be denominated.

initialDeposit.description: The initial amount of money to deposit when opening the account.

branchCode.description: The code of the branch where the account will be opened.

customerCategory.description: The category of the customer, which may determine eligibility for certain account types or features.

accountFeatures.description: Features that can be applied to the account based on customer needs.

onlineBanking.description: Flag indicating if online banking is available for the account.

mobileBanking.description: Flag indicating if mobile banking is available for the account.

internationalTransfer.description: Flag indicating if international transfers are allowed from this account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-AccountFe.description: The features associated with the banking account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message providing more context about the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the endpoint that caused the error.

trace.description: A stack trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on what to do next.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Represents a response structure for a 500 internal server error during account operations.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database timeout occurred while saving account information.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
